name: Tiny Jump
short_description: Tiny Jump: is a first-person platformer, Your goal is to climb all the way to the top while facing difficult jumps.
detailed_description:
Tiny Jump: is a first-person platformer

Your goal is to climb all the way to the top while facing difficult jumps

The Controls are easy and handy to use
and The mechanic is simple

Tiny jump: is an offline single player game

Tiny jump: is a simple game that focus only on the actual gameplay.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
